name: orphe-insole
description: JavaScript library for ORPHE insole devices

scripts.build: mkdir -p dist && cp src/ORPHE-INSOLE.js dist/orphe-insole.js && terser src/ORPHE-INSOLE.js -o dist/orphe-insole.min.js --source-map --mangle --compress
scripts.test:syntax: node --check src/ORPHE-INSOLE.js && node --check src/InsoleToolkit.js && node --check src/InsoleSimulator.js && node --check src/InsoleUtils.js && node --check src/InsoleFifo.js && node --check examples/device-test/device-test.js && node --check examples/quaternion-validation/metrics.js && node --check examples/quaternion-validation/app.js && node --check examples/terminal/index.js && node --check examples/hula-motion-sonifier/app.js && node --check examples/balance-tuner/balance-tuner.js && node --check examples/showcase/app.js && node --check examples/showcase/demo-data.js && node --check examples/showcase/i18n.js && node --check examples/showcase/viz-3d.js && node --check examples/showcase/viz-imu.js && node --check examples/showcase/viz-pressure.js && node --check examples/balance-sway/balance-sway.js && node --check examples/VISUALIZE/sketch.js && node --check examples/music-shoe/app.js && node --check examples/music-shoe/lab.js && node --check examples/fifo-vs-realtime/app.js && node --check experiments/gip-gait-poser/gip/body-model.js && node --check experiments/gip-gait-poser/gip/pose.js && node --check experiments/gip-gait-poser/gip/smoothing.js && node --check experiments/gip-gait-poser/gip/gait-module.js && node --check experiments/gip-gait-poser/gip/synthetic.js && node --check experiments/gip-gait-poser/gip/viz.js && node --check experiments/gip-gait-poser/gip/app.js
scripts.test:unit: node tests/insole-parser.test.js && node tests/quaternion-validation.test.js && node tests/quaternion-validation-page.test.js && node tests/hula-detector.test.js && node tests/insole-stability.test.js && node tests/insole-coexistence.test.js && node tests/insole-simulator.test.js && node tests/insole-utils.test.js && node tests/insole-fifo.test.js && node tests/insole-version-sync.test.js && node tests/gip-gait.test.js && node examples/balance-tuner/test-balance-tuner.mjs
scripts.test: npm run test:syntax && npm run test:unit && npm run test:types

author: Tetsuaki Baba
